description: GENERATED from crates/isi-analysis/src/oisi_schema.rs (SCHEMA) — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with OISI_REGEN_SCHEMA=1 cargo test -p isi-analysis --test oisi_schema_contract. Documents every group, dataset, and attribute an .oisi file can contain; `present_when` marks conditional entities.

/acquisition.doc: Raw acquisition payload — camera frames, per-frame stimulus state, schedule, quality.

frames.doc: Raw sensor frames; gzip+fletcher32 chunked (1, H, W).

timestamps_sec.doc: Unified seconds from t0 (first frame system timestamp).

drift_us.present_when: ≥2 frames carrying both hardware and system timestamps

end_offset_us.present_when: ≥2 frames carrying both hardware and system timestamps

start_offset_us.present_when: ≥2 frames carrying both hardware and system timestamps

t0_system_us.doc: System timestamp of the first camera frame.

/acquisition/clock_sync.doc: Camera↔QPC clock offset at start/end (drift detection).

acquisition_complete.doc: Whether the acquisition ran to completion.

stimulus_timing_validatable.doc: 1 iff presented on a physical hardware scanout (vblank); else stimulus_drops_total is not physically meaningful.

mean_frame_intensity.doc: Mean pixel intensity per camera frame.

/acquisition/quality.doc: Per-acquisition timing/drop quality metrics computed at export.

dropped_frame_indices.doc: Indices of frames flagged as drops at capture.

/acquisition/timing.doc: Timing characterization (frame-rate ratios, jitter, phase coverage).
/acquisition/timing.present_when: a TimingCharacterization was attached to the acquisition

/analysis_state.doc: Incremental-cache fingerprints: one attribute per pipeline stage, BLAKE3 Merkle key of that stage's inputs.
/analysis_state.dynamic_attributes: one VarLenUnicode attribute per cacheable stage, keyed by the stage's fingerprint_key (BLAKE3 hex)
/analysis_state.present_when: after first analysis run (incremental cache populated)

/cache.doc: Non-result intermediates the incremental cache restores (regenerable; safe to delete).
/cache.present_when: an analysis run persisted the patch-threshold tail

/complex_maps.doc: Per-orientation fwd/rev complex maps (real/imag split: f64 (H,W,2)).
/complex_maps.present_when: after first analysis run OR a complex-map import

/hardware.doc: Per-acquisition hardware snapshot (monitor + camera identity + viewing geometry).
/hardware.present_when: raw acquisition with a hardware snapshot

display_max.doc: Upper bound of the display range.

display_min.doc: Lower bound of the display range.

nan_means.doc: Semantic of NaN (empty if no NaN).

palette.doc: Colormap key (hsv_circular | jet | hot | binary | categorical).

units.doc: Value units (rad | deg | unitless | bool | label).

zero_means.doc: Sentinel meaning of literal 0 (empty if 0 is a value).

/results.doc: Analysis output maps. Every dataset except area_signs carries MapMeta attrs.

analysis_params.doc: serde JSON of the tagged AnalysisConfig.

animal_id.present_when: session metadata with a non-empty animal id

experiment_params.doc: serde JSON of the typed ExperimentConfig.

rig_params.doc: serde JSON of the typed RigConfig.

source_type.doc: Origin: "raw_acquisition" or an importer source tag.

/anatomical.doc: Anatomical (vasculature) image captured at session start.

title: OpenISI .oisi file structure (HDF5)
